buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
$comment_M0_7: v2.3 M0.7 — Backend moved off Vercel serverless (BackgroundTasks doesn't survive serverless freezes). Frontend stays on Vercel as a static SPA. /api/* proxies to the Railway backend via the BACKEND_HOST env var (set in Vercel project settings, value is your Railway service domain, e.g. talkingtoad-api.up.railway.app). See docs/deployment-railway.md.
